title: Gantt group summary color determination

posts.author: HarmLommers (Harm Lommers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I have grouped my gantt over a persons column. When I enable the group summary, a colored line is shown.

How is this color determined? The colors that I see do not match any other columns in the table, and now I added two persons who got the same color…

image1494×402 45 KB

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @HarmLommers ,

This is a limitation of Monday, but it looks like they may be working on it soon. Here’s the feature request where I got this update: Customize chart widget colors - #52 by jessadhay

image705×322 24.7 KB
